translations.app.name: MCW Launcher
translations.home.subtitle: Your launch deck: current account, active instance, and core status in one place.
translations.accounts.subtitle: Manage offline accounts. Microsoft sign-in is prepared but remains locked until application approval is granted.
translations.instances.subtitle: Create and manage isolated Minecraft instances, including Fabric Loader and per-instance mods.
translations.instance_settings.subtitle: Settings are loaded and saved through the public SettingsManager API.
translations.launcher_settings.subtitle: Preferences here belong to the GUI, not to an individual Minecraft instance.
translations.logs.subtitle: Frontend activity and structured progress events appear here.
translations.about.subtitle: Project information and the responsibilities of this GUI layer.
translations.home.active_account.title: Active account
translations.home.active_account.description: The account used for the next launch.
translations.home.active_account.empty_hint: Open Accounts to create an offline account.
translations.home.active_instance.title: Active instance
translations.home.active_instance.description: The instance attached to the permanent launch bar.
translations.home.active_instance.empty_hint: Open Instances to create or choose one.
translations.home.core_connection.title: Core connection
translations.home.core_connection.description: GUI only calls the public MCW Core API.
translations.launch.pause_requested_detail: Stopping active downloads safely. Partial files will be kept.
translations.launch.paused_detail: Partial files were kept. Press Launch to resume the download.

translations.launch.requirements_hint: Select an account and an instance, then launch.
translations.account.saved.title: Saved accounts
translations.account.create_offline.title: Create offline account
translations.account.username.rules: Minecraft usernames use 3-16 letters, numbers, or underscores.

translations.instance.create.description: Choose Vanilla or Fabric. Fabric automatically uses the recommended stable Loader version.

translations.instance.create.fabric_hint: Fabric Loader versions can be changed later under Manage selected instance.

translations.instance.manage.include_saves: Include saves when cloning or exporting
translations.instance.manage.remove_fabric_hint: Apply Vanilla to remove Fabric Loader from this instance. Mod files are kept in its mods folder.

translations.launcher_settings.language.label: Launcher language
translations.launcher_settings.language.add_hint: Add another language by placing a compatible JSON file in the lang folder.
translations.launcher_settings.appearance.title: Appearance
translations.launcher_settings.appearance.description: The current stylesheet is intentionally text-only so custom icons and pixel assets can be added later.
translations.about.description: A modular, open-source Minecraft launcher built with Python and PySide6.
translations.about.architecture.title: SRP architecture
translations.about.assets.title: Assets
translations.about.assets.description: No icon dependency is baked into the code. Buttons remain text-first until custom assets are added.

translations.mod_manager.title: Mod Manager
translations.mod_manager.select_instance_hint: Choose a Fabric instance to manage its mods.
translations.mod_manager.search_placeholder: Search name, mod id, version, source, update, or file...
translations.mod_manager.metadata.select_hint: Select a mod to view metadata, dependencies, update state, and compatibility issues.
translations.mod_manager.vanilla_warning: This instance is Vanilla. Apply Fabric Loader from the Instances page before adding mods.

translations.error.instance_running.title: Instance already running
translations.error.instance_running.message: This instance is already being used by Minecraft. Close that game before launching the same instance again.
translations.error.download_verification.title: Download verification failed
translations.error.download_verification.message: A downloaded file did not pass its integrity check. The launcher removed the incomplete file so it can be downloaded again safely.
translations.error.storage.title: Not enough storage
translations.error.storage.message: There is not enough free disk space to finish preparing Minecraft or Java.
translations.error.file_access.title: File access denied
translations.error.file_access.message: The launcher could not write to one of its folders. Check folder permissions and whether another program is locking the file.
translations.error.network.title: Network error
translations.error.network.message: The launcher could not finish the download. Check the connection and try launching again.
translations.error.java_runtime.title: Java runtime setup failed
translations.error.java_runtime.message: The launcher could not prepare the Java runtime required by this Minecraft version.
translations.error.java_setup.title: Java setup failed
translations.error.minecraft_launch.title: Minecraft launch failed
translations.error.minecraft_launch.message: Minecraft could not be started. The technical detail below can be used for debugging.
translations.error.launch.title: Launch failed
translations.launch.error.logs_hint: Open Logs to see the full error details.
translations.app.close.task_running:
A launcher task is still running.
Close the window after it finishes.

translations.account.username.invalid: Username must contain 3-16 letters, numbers, or underscores.

translations.launch.account_required: Create or select an account first.
translations.about.developer_asset_note_fixed:
Dev by mahiru7229
UI assets can be replaced later.
translations.about.architecture.description:
• MainWindow assembles the shell and routes signals.
• Pages own presentation and user input.
• Controllers call only public Core APIs.
• TaskRunner owns QThread lifecycle.
• Reusable widgets own their own rendering state.
translations.task.close_while_active: Cannot close TaskRunner while a task is active.
translations.fabric.repair.tooltip: Rebuild Fabric metadata and verify Loader libraries without changing mods or saves.
translations.modrinth.title: Modrinth
translations.modrinth.mod.title: Browse Modrinth mods
translations.modrinth.modpack.title: Browse Modrinth modpacks
translations.modrinth.mod.context.none: Open this browser from a Fabric or Forge instance to install compatible mods.
translations.modrinth.modpack.context: Choose a {loader} modpack. MCW Launcher will create a new instance, prepare its loader, and register its files for download on Launch.
translations.modrinth.column.name: Name
translations.modrinth.column.author: Author
translations.modrinth.mod.no_instance: Select and open a Fabric or Forge instance first.
translations.modrinth.mod.installed: Installed {count} mod file(s), including required dependencies.
translations.modrinth.modpack.name_required: Enter a name for the new instance.
translations.launcher_settings.update.title: Launcher updates
translations.launcher_settings.update.subtitle: Stable updates are used by default. Join the tester program only when you want to receive experimental builds.
translations.launcher_settings.update.auto_check: Automatically check for updates when the launcher starts
translations.update.status.downloading: Downloading and preparing the launcher update...
translations.update.status.latest: MCW Launcher is up to date
translations.update.status.installing: Installing the update and restarting MCW Launcher...
translations.update.dialog.title: MCW Launcher update
translations.update.dialog.heading: MCW Launcher {version} is available
translations.update.dialog.message: You are using {current}. The launcher can install {version} now. The application will close, overwrite files from the release ZIP, and start again.
translations.update.latest.title: No updates available
translations.update.latest.message: You are using the latest available MCW Launcher version.
translations.update.error.title: Launcher update
translations.update.error.packaged_only: Automatic installation is only available in the packaged Windows EXE. Build or run the release package to test automatic updates.
translations.update.error.check_failed:
MCW Launcher could not check for updates.

{error}
translations.update.status.waiting: Update is ready, but the launcher must be idle before installation
translations.update.error.tasks_running: The update cannot be installed while {count} launcher task(s) are still running. Finish or cancel them, then check again.
translations.update.error.instances_running: Close the running Minecraft instance(s) before updating: {names}
translations.diagnostics.export.title: Export diagnostics
translations.modrinth.channel.release_always: Release is always enabled. Enable prerelease channels only when needed.
translations.modrinth.channel.no_versions: No compatible versions are available in the enabled channels: {channels}.
translations.launcher_settings.modrinth.title: Modrinth release channels
translations.launcher_settings.modrinth.subtitle: Release versions are always shown. Enable Beta or Alpha only when you accept less stable project versions.
translations.launcher_settings.theme.title: Appearance and PNG theme
translations.launcher_settings.theme.subtitle: PNG theme files are optional. Missing or invalid files automatically fall back to the built-in CSS interface.
translations.launcher_settings.theme.show_static_text: Show static text over themed controls
Turn this off only when the selected theme PNG already contains its own fixed label, such as the word LAUNCH.
translations.runtime.no_game_log: No Minecraft log was found for this instance.
translations.runtime.no_crash_report: No crash report was found for this instance.
translations.repair.title: Repair instance
translations.repair.confirm: Fully verify and repair '{name}'? Worlds, mods, resource packs, and settings will be kept.
translations.repair.completed_message: Repair completed for '{name}'. Client, libraries, assets, natives, mod loader, and Java were verified.
translations.mod_manager.health_summary: Compatibility: {errors} error(s), {warnings} warning(s) • Modrinth tracked: {tracked} • Updates: {updates} • Channels: {channels}
translations.mod_manager.update.title: Update mods
translations.mod_manager.update.none: All unlocked Modrinth mods are up to date.
translations.mod_manager.update_notice.checking: Checking Modrinth for newer mod versions…
translations.mod_manager.update_notice.partial_failed: No installable updates were found, but {count} tracked mod(s) could not be checked. Select a mod to view details.
translations.mod_manager.update_notice.not_tracked: No Modrinth mods are tracked in this instance. Mods added manually are not checked automatically.
translations.mod_manager.update_notice.up_to_date: All tracked Modrinth mods are up to date.

translations.account.microsoft.status_pending: Microsoft authentication status: Pending application approval
translations.account.microsoft.title: Microsoft account
translations.account.microsoft.locked: Microsoft account sign-in is prepared but locked while MCW Launcher waits for Mojang/Microsoft application approval.

translations.launcher_settings.java.description: Scan Java from JAVA_HOME, PATH, Program Files, the Windows Registry, and managed runtimes.

translations.java.folder.missing: The selected Java directory no longer exists.
translations.instance.lifecycle.title: Backup and Modrinth pack lifecycle
translations.instance.lifecycle.description: Create safe backups, restore an instance, and update managed Modrinth packs without overwriting user-modified files.
translations.backup.scope.label: Backup scope
translations.backup.restore_confirm: Restore this backup into '{name}'? A safety backup will be created first.
translations.backup.title: Instance backup
translations.backup.folder.title: Instance backups
translations.modpack.lifecycle.select_hint: Select a Modrinth modpack instance to check its managed files and updates.
translations.modpack.lifecycle.detected: Managed Modrinth pack detected. Scan files or check for a newer pack version.
translations.modpack.lifecycle.not_managed: This instance is not managed by a Modrinth modpack.
translations.modpack.lifecycle.healthy: Managed pack files are healthy: {count} file(s) verified, {cached} reused from verification cache.
translations.modpack.lifecycle.changed: Managed pack changes detected: {modified} modified, {missing} missing. Repair restores the current pack version; update still preserves user changes.
translations.modpack.lifecycle.latest: This Modrinth modpack is up to date.
translations.modpack.lifecycle.confirm: Update '{name}' from {current} to {target}? A full safety backup will be created and user-modified files will be preserved.

translations.account.page.subtitle: Manage offline and Microsoft accounts.
translations.account.create.title: Add account
translations.account.create.description: Create an offline account or sign in with Microsoft.
translations.account.microsoft.tooltip: Sign in through Microsoft to use an authenticated Minecraft account.
translations.account.microsoft.waiting: Waiting for Microsoft sign-in… Close the browser window and press Cancel here to stop.
translations.account.security.title: Account security
translations.account.security.description: Verify database integrity and re-protect Microsoft refresh tokens for this Windows user.
translations.account.security.reprotected: Stored account credentials were re-protected successfully.
translations.instance_settings.modrinth.title: Modrinth downloads
translations.instance_settings.modrinth.description: Recommended: keep this enabled. Turn it off only when you plan to download failed modpack files manually.
translations.instance_settings.modrinth.block_launch: Stop launch when required Modrinth files are missing
This option belongs to the selected instance. Disable it to let Minecraft launch after three failed download rounds, then place the missing files manually in the paths shown by the launcher.
translations.launch_error.modrinth_missing.title: Required Modrinth files are missing
translations.launch_error.modrinth_missing.summary: The launcher could not download every required Modrinth file after three rounds. Retry the launch, install the listed files manually, or open Instance Settings > Modrinth downloads for this instance to allow launch with missing files.
translations.launcher_settings.bandwidth.title: Download bandwidth
translations.launcher_settings.bandwidth.description: The limit is shared by all simultaneous downloads. Leave it disabled for unlimited speed.
translations.launcher_settings.update.tester_mode: Join tester program and receive experimental updates
translations.launcher_settings.update.tester_warning: Experimental updates may contain unfinished features, bugs, crashes, or compatibility issues. Back up important instances and worlds before joining.
translations.modrinth.channel.label: Release channel: Release is always enabled
translations.about.theme_assets.title: Theme assets
translations.about.theme_assets.description: PNG themes are loaded from the themes folder. Every asset is optional, so missing or invalid files safely fall back to the built-in CSS interface.
translations.repair.tooltip: Verify the client, libraries, assets, natives, mod loader, and Java without changing worlds or mods.
translations.launcher_settings.modrinth.include_beta: Include Beta mod and modpack versions
translations.launcher_settings.modrinth.include_alpha: Include Alpha mod and modpack versions

translations.instances.manage.remove_loader: Apply Vanilla to remove the current mod loader. Mod files are kept in the instance mods folder.
